item.title: I was interviewed for NPR!!
item.description: I had VNS surgery last fall. My sister is a producer for the TED Radio Hour, and their episode this week was about brain hacks, and as a lifelong NPR nerd, this might just be the coolest thing that's ever happened to me. https://www.npr.org/2024/01/26/1226681286/how-a-tiny-implant-can-stop-seizures-from-happening?utm_term=nprnews&utm_campaign=npr&utm_source=facebook.com&utm_medium=social&fbclid=IwAR0quIH0UsXZfFVKEhkrk_MQgU68HO3nZ_lSUCvI4HvJLDCuUvSuui0b8q0
item.dc:creator: MissJane

item.title: Bottom shelf memes that are less than cool.
item.description:
@epicurusaquinas this one is for you.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
[Stolen from https://imgur.com/gallery/HqU2xWp ]
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Join to gaslight me!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Good Bye. :)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Happiness ist the best
item.description: Edit: thank you all so much! It means the world that you care!!! Letting go is the best! I didn't even know what it felt like to be just contented and actually happy with my life! Thanks you guys for your support. For those who might care: after everything that’s happened between me and my husband I swore to myself to not go back to the relationship as it was before. Still I was willing to give everything a chance and offered that we could commit to working on us but from separated homes and see where it takes us. He started therapy and that’s good for him. He wasn’t up to committing to anything and instead of wasting away in grief, I just let go. It was tough but today for the first time in years I saw a silver lining. It stopped hurting for a while. I was just proud of myself, taking care of my children and our home, nothing more. No pain. No regret. Just relief. I know the pain will be back on worse days. But those will happen less. As I've seen it now, I know a bright side actually exists.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCatPerson

item.title: LISTEN TO OUR SCREAMS FOR HELP
item.description:
Go support Erin https://open.substack.com/pub/erininthemorn/p/ohio-michigan-republicans-in-released?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=2dhxde
https://youtu.be/Dy-_4WyxoWQ
Trans people are under attack and they absolutely need to be voted out. If you consider yourself any level of an idea, help us PLEASE WE ARE GETTING TARGETED, HAVING OUR HEALTHCARE REVOKED, OUR RIGHTS TO EXIST IN PUBLIC PLACES THROWN AWAY, STOCHASTIC TERRORIST TALKING HEADS ARE TARGETING US AND WE ARE BEING KILLED (ESPECIALLY TRANS PEOPLE OF COLOR) PLEASE HELP PLEASE HELP PLEASE PLEASE LISTEN TO OUR CRIES
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.title: Wholesome af
item.description: A person I formerly rented from asked me for my current address recently. This person rented me a space in their house that was the first place I had to actually call home when I had to leave my house after I got divorced. I paid a completely fair amount of money for my accommodations and really enjoyed my time there, and like all rental situations, I figured that was that. Yesterday I got this in the mail. It's a letter from that person, informing me that they sold their house and that they were paying me and every tenant they ever had for what we contributed to the profit they made from selling the house. I have been sitting with this for more than a day and I am still completely beyond an actual way to describe what this act means to me. All that I can say is that there are people who talk about their values and there are people who actually live them, and the reason I wanted to share this is that I want to encourage us all to actually live our values. Do it off the clock, do it when no one is watching, do it always. (This is shared anonymized to the person that did it, but with their permission. They agreed that if this could inspire others to take kind actions, it was worth sharing) by Chris Robarge Found through wholesome page on fb. I am not op
item.dc:creator: Humangiver

item.title: Ted Koppel stands up to Hannity
item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: Don't Ever Forget
item.description: "For your consideration..." - Rod Serling FP Edit::: I can't believe I have to say this --- but this post and Remembrance Day is about the WW2 atrocity and learning from it. I do not support hate towards any humans. And we are all human. Note: My typical "Cheers!" at the end of post text has been removed after one Imgurian's astute observation that it was inappropriate (they were very correct - and I didn't think first).
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas
